rationale: The citing paper is an agent-based diffusion study of movie attendance and advertising effects, while the cited paper analyzes brand-level WOM antecedents (e.g., differentiation/excitement) across online/offline channels; the provided notes show no direct use of the cited paper’s data, model, or specific constructs in the citing contribution. With only one DOI match and no in-text matched context indicating substantive dependence, this looks like a general WOM background citation rather than a core linkage.
